generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our NATO allies are still not pulling their weight. While we're over here securing global stability, some members are only contributing 1% of GDP to defense. Meanwhile, our own communities are struggling with basic preparedness. Time to rethink how we're sharing this burden. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
